title: Import data
description: Bring your initial product catalog, prices, and opening stock into Puntovivo with a reviewable import isolated to your business.

upload.title: Choose a source file
upload.description: Upload a UTF-8 CSV or an Excel .xlsx file up to 10 MB and 500 data rows. The file stays in this browser until you preview it.

map.title: Map your columns
map.description: Confirm the detected columns. Product name and SKU are required; every other field can be left unmapped.

preview.title: Review before importing
preview.description: Puntovivo revalidates every row on the server and skips existing or repeated SKUs and barcodes.

issues.out_of_range: Value is outside the allowed range
issues.duplicate_file_sku: SKU is repeated in this file
issues.duplicate_existing_sku: SKU already exists in this business
issues.duplicate_file_barcode: Barcode is repeated in this file
issues.duplicate_existing_barcode: Barcode already exists in this business
issues.concurrent_duplicate: Another import created this product while this import was running
issues.import_failed: The product could not be imported
issues.stock_failed: The product was imported but opening stock could not be recorded

table.previewLimit: Showing the first 100 of {{count}} rows. The summary and import include every row.

template.sampleDescription: Replace this row with your product data

fileErrors.file_too_large: The file exceeds the 10 MB limit.
fileErrors.empty_file: The file does not contain data rows.
fileErrors.empty_header: Every source column needs a header.
fileErrors.duplicate_header: Source column headers must be unique.
fileErrors.too_many_rows: Import at most 500 rows at a time.
fileErrors.row_too_wide: A data row contains more values than the header row.
fileErrors.malformed_csv: The CSV contains an unfinished or invalid quoted value.
fileErrors.workbook_empty: The Excel workbook does not contain a worksheet.

toast.previewError: The file could not be validated
toast.importError: The import could not be completed
